conversation.text: Build a workflow that runs every day at 9am, fetches data from a Google Sheet (document ID '1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKvBdBZjgmUUqptlbs74OgVE2upms', sheet 'Daily Report'), and sends an email summary via Gmail to team@example.com with the subject 'Daily Report'. Configure all nodes completely and don't ask for credentials.

executionScenarios.name: daily-summary
executionScenarios.description: Scheduled workflow reads rows and sends a Gmail summary
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The Google Sheets read returns three daily report rows with status, owner, and notes fields. Gmail returns a successful send response.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow has a daily 9am schedule trigger, reads from document ID 1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKvBdBZjgmUUqptlbs74OgVE2upms and sheet Daily Report, and sends one Gmail message to team@example.com with subject Daily Report. The email body summarizes the sheet data rather than sending an empty or hardcoded message.
